name: kb-access
description: OCHA CHD DS team knowledge-base access: kb-search + kb-doctor skills, and a SessionStart hook that keeps a local clone of ds-knowledge-base (and the internal companion, if you have access) present and on current main. Self-bootstrapping: a fresh machine needs only this plugin — the hook clones the KB on first session start.

author.name: OCHA Centre for Humanitarian Data — Data Science
